x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Change models define the rules Now Assist ITSM AI Agent uses to scope risk reasoning and route approvals. Without them the AI applies generic logic regardless of change type.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure active change models via chg_model_list.do for Normal, Standard, and Emergency change types at minimum. Change models define the rules Now Assist AI Agent uses to scope risk reasoning and route approvals.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c2a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Change models define the rules Now Assist ITSM AI Agent uses to scope risk reasoning and route approvals. Without them the AI applies generic logic regardless of change type.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Change Model Usage</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('chg_model');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active change models configured';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active change models. Now Assist AI Agent has well-defined rules for scoping risk reasoning and routing approvals across change types.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active change model(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist AI Agent change handling will have limited differentiation across change types.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active change models. Now Assist AI Agent uses change models to scope risk reasoning and route approvals — without them all changes are treated identically.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005969</number>
<order>300</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure active change models via chg_model_list.do for Normal, Standard, and Emergency change types at minimum. Change models define the rules Now Assist AI Agent uses to scope risk reasoning and route approvals.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c2a</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
